item.title: Added student enhancements!
item.description:
🚀 We’ve just rolled out two highly requested features on Labiteers that make managing student virtual machines smoother and more reliable than ever.

🔁 Start Fresh with One Click

Students can now delete their assigned VM and start again from scratch using a new Delete VM button. No more manual intervention, no more rebasing images, and no waiting for an administrator. This gives learners the freedom to experiment, make mistakes, and learn by doing — exactly how hands-on training should work.

item.title: Added support for Windows 11!
item.description:
We are excited to announce that we have added support for Windows 11!

To usitilise Windows 11 VMs in your labs, follow the instructions below:

  1. In your Microsoft Azure account, navigate to your Azure subscription, Settings, Usage + quotas.

  2. Increase the limit of your region’s quota.

Done!

Once your quota request has been approved, you can go back to Labiteers and spin up Windows 11 VMs.

item.title: Launching Labiteers Blog!
item.description: Today we launch the blog of Labiteers, our SaaS platform that helps students spin up cloud labs instantly.
